STSBOSSANCIENTS-PAIN.title: Pain
STSBOSSANCIENTS-PAIN.description: While in hand, lose [blue]1[/blue] HP each time you play another card.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TRUE_HYPERBEAM.title: True Hyper Beam
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TRAINING_STRIKE.title: Training Strike
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TRAINING_STRIKE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
On [gold]kill[/gold], [gold]Mysterious Cocoon[/gold] gains {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} experience.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-PIERCING_STRIKE.title: Piercing Strike
STSBOSSANCIENTS-PIERCING_STRIKE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Apply [gold]Poison[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-RITUAL_STRIKE.title: Ritual Strike
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHANT.title: Chant
